name: EdwBhiMbrCobStep4Ds

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH T1 AS (SELECT B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, B.MBR_EFF_DT_SK, B.MBR_TERM_DT_SK, B.MBR_COB_TYP_CD, B.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, B.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, B.BEG_EFF_DT_SK, B.BEG_TERM_DT_SK, B.MID_EFF_DT_SK, B.MID_TERM_DT_SK, B.END_EFF_DT_SK, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), DATEADD(DAY, -1, CONVERT(DATE, A.MID_EFF_DT_SK, 23)), 23) AS END_TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT A, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.W_BHI_MBR_COB_SPLT B WHERE A.MBR_UNIQ_KEY = B.MBR_UNIQ_KEY AND A.MID_EFF_DT_SK BETWEEN B.END_EFF_DT_SK AND B.END_TERM_DT_SK), CTE AS (SELECT T.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, T.MBR_EFF_DT_SK, T.MBR_TERM_DT_SK, T.MBR_COB_TYP_CD, T.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, T.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, T.BEG_EFF_DT_SK, T.BEG_TERM_DT_SK, T.MID_EFF_DT_SK, T.MID_TERM_DT_SK, T.END_EFF_DT_SK, MAX(T.END_TERM_DT_SK) AS END_TERM_DT_SK FROM T1 T GROUP BY T.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, T.MBR_EFF_DT_SK, T.MBR_TERM_DT_SK, T.MBR_COB_TYP_CD, T.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, T.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, T.BEG_EFF_DT_SK, T.BEG_TERM_DT_SK, T.MID_EFF_DT_SK, T.MID_TERM_DT_SK, T.END_EFF_DT_SK) SELECT CTE.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, CTE.MBR_EFF_DT_SK, CTE.MBR_TERM_DT_SK, CTE.MBR_COB_TYP_CD, CTE.MBR_COB_EFF_DT_SK, CTE.MBR_COB_TERM_DT_SK, CTE.BEG_EFF_DT_SK, CTE.BEG_TERM_DT_SK, CTE.MID_EFF_DT_SK, CTE.MID_TERM_DT_SK, CTE.END_EFF_DT_SK, CTE.END_TERM_DT_SK, 'Y' AS UPDT_IN FROM CTE
